name: cache
description: Configures caching services (Memcached and Redis) with Redis password authentication and Memcached configuration.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Configures FastAPI Python application with PostgreSQL database, including Python virtual environment setup, Git repository deployment, and systemd service management.

name: nginx-multisite
